M1810-CTI Red

  • Regular price $519.82

M1810



Motor Pro75 6128-M1810-RL-P
Diameter 75mm
Burn Time 3.39 seconds
Average Thrust 1811.3 Ns (407.2 lb-s)
Max Thrust 2158.6 N (485.27 lbs)
Total Impulse 6132 Ns (1378.53 lb-s)
Motor Type Reload
Motor data provided by ThrustCurve.org
To convert Newtons to Pounds, divide by 4.448
Motor Data: RockSim RASP
